重大頭條（股市相關） ·

CPO與AI光通訊題材加溫 訊芯-KY單周飆升三成創新高 首季仍陷虧損CPO frenzy lifts KY-listed optics play to a weekly high despite a soft Q1

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460381

  • 訊芯-KY因AI伺服器走向光傳輸與CPO布局受矚目，與美系晶片大廠長期協作並具鴻海體系資源。
  • 本週連兩日觸及漲停，收盤約577元創歷史新高，單週漲幅逾三成，成交量約3.45萬張。
  • 第一季為傳統淡季，營收與毛利率承壓，本業轉虧，每股稅後虧損約1.45元。
  • 法人面外資與自營商為買方；公開觀測資訊顯示總經理於4月小幅調節持股。

訊芯-KY在CPO與AI光傳輸題材下本週強勢上攻並創新高，但首季淡季本業轉虧；外資與自營商買超，高階主管曾小幅減持。

  • AI server optics and CPO plans spotlight the KY name via a long Broadcom tie and Foxconn-linked resources.
  • Back-to-back limit-up days sent the close to about NT$577, a record, with the week up over 30% on ~34.5k lots traded.
  • Q1 seasonality hit revenue and margins, pushing operations into the red with an EPS loss near NT$1.45.
  • Foreign desks and proprietary traders bought on balance; filings show the CEO trimmed a small stake in April.

CPO/AI optics hype drove a >30% weekly rally to a record close, but Q1 stayed loss-making; foreign/prop buyers offset a small CEO trim in April.
